ValidationRule.description: When cancelling a "Request" and the reason is "Other", the User must specify in the "Cancelation Details" field.
ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula: ISPICKVAL( Status__c , "Cancelled")&& ISBLANK(Cancellation_Reason__c) && ISPICKVAL(Cancellation_Reason_PickList__c,'Other') && NOT($Profile.Id='00eb0000000oBvcAAE') && RecordType.DeveloperName <> 'Solution_Implementation' && RecordType.DeveloperName <> 'Solution_Engineering' && RecordType.DeveloperName <> 'Supplier_Questionnaires' && RecordType.DeveloperName <> 'Technical_Solutions' && RecordType.DeveloperName <> 'Advisory_Services_Request'
ValidationRule.errorMessage: When choosing "Other" please specify the Cancellation Reason in the "Cancellation Details" field.
